question: Create `ansible-installeren-op-ubuntu-control-no_concepts.txt` and explain how the concept 'Ansible installeren op Ubuntu (control node)' applies to this topic.
hint: Write at least two lines and include the concept name explicitly.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
[ -f ansible-installeren-op-ubuntu-control-no_concepts.txt ] || exit 1
grep -qi "Ansible installeren op Ubuntu (control node)" ansible-installeren-op-ubuntu-control-no_concepts.txt || exit 1
[ $(wc -l < ansible-installeren-op-ubuntu-control-no_concepts.txt) -ge 2 ] || exit 1
exit 0
